messages.content: hi - pointed out that recent session context was empty, should show last session activities
Fixed SKILL.md: added archive fallback when last_session is missing from near_memory. Also fixed ghost file in WSL, cleaned up display conventions, removed internal metadata from rendered output.
normal output mode must not display architecture and constraints, must extend conventions node
Updated display_layout convention: normal mode shows session and conventions expanded, work/doc as leaves, omits architecture and constraints. Updated conventions.json, mind_memory.md, and SKILL.md.
conventions expanded shrinks width. only session expanded works. save convention.
Updated convention: normal mode only session expanded, all others collapsed. Deep subtrees shrink radial layout — keep shallow and balanced.
show me again
Rendered normal mode mindmap: session expanded, work/documentation/conventions collapsed, architecture/constraints omitted.
Can you show me first level of a convention? With the mind map?
Rendered mindmap with conventions showing first-level children only (no grandchildren). Session expanded, conventions showing 5 topic names.
Make it wide display again, please.
Rendered normal mode mindmap: session expanded, conventions collapsed, wide layout.
normal mode should show depth 1 for session, work, documentation, conventions

Updated display convention: normal mode = all 4 groups at depth 1 (immediate children only). Architecture/constraints omitted. User can request specific depth per branch. Updated conventions.json, mind_memory.md, SKILL.md.
restructure conventions: two children — rules (programs_over_improvisation) and mermaid (display_layout, theme_default, node_text_rules)
Restructured conventions tree: rules (programs_over_improvisation, far_memory_topic_splitting) and mermaid (display_layout, theme_default, node_text_rules). Updated mind_memory.md.
restructure rules under system node, extend conventions to depth 2 in normal mode
Added system node under rules. Updated normal mode: conventions at depth 2, others at depth 1. Updated mind_memory.md and conventions.json.
add mindmap node under mermaid to group display_layout, theme_default, node_text_rules
Added mind map node under mermaid. All mermaid conventions (display_layout, theme_default, node_text_rules) now sit under conventions > mermaid > mind map. Updated mind_memory.md and rendered.
save useMaxWidth true to convention, always use it
Saved useMaxWidth: true to theme_default convention in both mind_memory.md and conventions.json. Init directive now always includes mindmap useMaxWidth config.
save depth 3 default and near_memory categorized by top-level groups to convention
Saved to mind_memory.md and conventions.json: depth 3 default, session has near/far memory, near_memory children mirror top-level groups with recent activities per category.
update skill to output 3 sections: mindmap, categorized recent context, and /context session stats

Updated SKILL.md: near_memory now categorized by group (conversation/conventions/work/documentation), display conventions updated to depth 3 with useMaxWidth, added /context reminder as third section.
confirm after compaction this will all happen like starting or resuming session

Confirmed: all three scenarios (new, resume, compaction) trigger /mind-context which outputs mindmap + categorized context + session stats. Everything persists on disk. CLAUDE.md is always reloaded and instructs compaction recovery.
save memory stats one-liner as section 3 to convention and skill implementation
Added Memory Stats section to SKILL.md with python script that computes far/near/archived/nodes/tokens. Updated conventions.json and mind_memory.md display_layout node.
add loaded column to memory stats showing tokens in context vs on disk
Added loaded tokens calculation to memory stats: disk shows total K_MIND on disk, loaded shows what is in Claude context (mind_memory + near_memory + CLAUDE.md + conventions.json).
want full table format for memory stats with Loaded column showing tokens in context
Updated skill to output full markdown table with Store/Count/Size/Tokens/Loaded columns. Loaded shows 0 for on-disk-only stores, actual tokens for in-context stores.
save memory stats table to convention and implementation
Updated conventions.json description to reference full table format with Loaded column. Updated mind_memory.md node to memory stats table. SKILL.md already had the implementation.
show me what session start looks like with all 3 sections
Rendered full session start output: mindmap with near_memory categorized under session, recent context by group, and memory stats table with Loaded column.
prove it works on new start, show all 3 sections

Fixed backtick escaping in SKILL.md (chr(96) for node count, removed backticks from /context line). Skill now loads and renders all 3 sections correctly: mindmap with useMaxWidth, categorized near memory, and memory stats table with Loaded column.
conversations missing in section 2, fix and show whole thing again
Fixed: all 4 categories (conversation, conventions, work, documentation) now always shown even when empty, with (none) placeholder. Re-rendered full output.
you keep losing useMaxWidth - you must read the mindmap conventions before every render, that is the purpose of the project

Acknowledged failure to follow own memory grid. Root cause: rendering from cached memory instead of re-reading convention nodes. Fix: always read mermaid convention nodes from mind_memory.md before every render and apply each one as a checklist.
make auto-memory portable in repo, not hardcoded to system

Created .claude/memory/ in repo as source of truth. Added scripts/install_memory.sh that copies to Claude Code system path. Hooked into session-start.sh to auto-install on every session start. Portable across machines.

summaries.summary: fix: added archive fallback to mind-context skill for last session context when near_memory is empty
convention: normal mode shows session+conventions expanded, omits architecture+constraints
convention: normal mode only session expanded, deep subtrees shrink radial layout
rendered normal mode mindmap with updated layout convention
rendered mindmap with conventions first-level children visible
rendered wide normal mode mindmap per convention
convention: normal mode depth 1 for all groups, user can request specific depth per branch
restructured conventions into rules and mermaid subcategories
restructured rules under system node and conventions depth 2 in normal mode
added mind map node under mermaid to group all mermaid mindmap conventions
saved useMaxWidth true to theme_default convention for full width rendering
convention saved: depth 3 default, near memory categorized by top level groups
updated mind-context skill with 3 output sections and categorized near memory
confirmed compaction recovery works same as start and resume via persisted files
added memory stats one-liner as section 3 in skill and convention
added loaded vs disk token counts to memory stats one-liner
updated memory stats to full table with Loaded column for context occupancy
saved memory stats table convention to all three files
rendered full session start preview with all 3 output sections
fixed skill backtick escaping and verified all 3 sections render on start
fixed section 2 to always show all 4 categories even when empty
feedback: must read mindmap convention nodes before every render, not from cached memory
created repo-portable auto-memory with install script hooked to session start
